name: Macalania Cloister of Trials
steps: Push the pedestal down the ramp on the far side of the entry area. Follow it down.
Go back up the ramp and take the Macalania Sphere from the raised section. Return below and place it into the pedestal.
The pedestal is diverted right by the glyph and gets teleported into an ice stalagmite that holds a Destruction Sphere.
Place a Glyph Sphere into the nearby pedestal and push it toward the stalagmite — this shatters it and frees the Destruction Sphere.
Remove the Glyph Sphere from the pedestal and set it in the far-left slot — a cube section of wall rises into the chamber above.
Push the pedestal toward the column section on the far right to make a section of the ice tunnel reappear above.
Ascend the ramp and step on the floor switch to bring the pedestal and Macalania Sphere to the top level.
Descend and step on the floor switch to extract the pedestal from the stalagmite. Place the Macalania Sphere from below into the pedestal.
Return to the upper level and push the pedestal toward the stalagmites again to restore more ice. Retrieve the Macalania Sphere that caused the stalagmites to reappear.
Push the pedestal toward the ramp on the far side so it slides back below. Push it back into place at the bottom of the stairs.
Ascend to the upper level and take the Macalania Sphere that powers the ramp — place it into the last column to complete the ice tunnel.
Place the Destruction Sphere into the pedestal at the far end to reveal the Luck Sphere chest. Collect it.
Exit through the now-complete ice tunnel to reach the Chamber of the Fayth.
